sections.paragraph:
Κρήσκης, εντος, ὁ (Lat. Crescens; the Gk. form is quite rare [Κρί-Just., A II, 3, 1; Tat. 19, 1], the Lat. form common, incl. Pol 14, which is preserved only in Lat.) Crescens, a companion of Paul 2 Ti 4:10. S. Κρίσπος. New Docs 3, 91.—LGPN I.

Lat. Lat. = Latin

Gk. Gk. = Greek

Just Just , II a.d.—List 5

Tat Tat , II a.d.—List 5

incl. incl. = including

Pol Pol = Polycarp to the Philippians—List 1

LGPN LGPN = A Lexicon of Greek Personal Names—List 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 566
